name: Topfenkuchen Cheesecake - German
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Flour; sift on pastry board
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a well in the center of the flour and put into it the sugar, egg yolks, softened butter, and lemon rind. Quickly work these ingredients into the flour to make a smooth dough, adding a bit more flour if needed.
2. On a floured board, roll out the dough into an 11x17-inch rectangle. Line a baking sheet with the dough.
3. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for about 15 minutes, or until it is about half done. Let cool.
4. Add the 4 egg yolks and lemon rind to the cottage cheese. Beat the egg whites until very stiff, gradually adding the sugar, beginning when they have slightly stiffened.
5. Fold the beaten egg whites into the cheese filling and spread the cooled pastry shell with the cheese filling. Sprinkle the cake with raisins and almonds.
6. Bake in a very slow oven (250°F) about 45 minutes. Let cool and cut into large squares.
